plugins.name: anvil-core-stable
plugins.description: Anvil discipline — agents, skills, and parameterized prompts for human-driven sprint TDD. No dispatch.

plugins.name: anvil-orchestrator-stable
plugins.description: Anvil orchestrator — high-level human-in-the-loop automation for sprint TDD. One stage, one approval, full inner loop.

plugins.name: anvil-common-stable
plugins.description: Internal — shared primitives for Anvil (formats, templates, TDD / commit / worktree discipline). Installed transitively.
